title: Shaded docs commit paused on overlapping consolidate-docs claim
body: Shaded Masking Shadow has active commit-queue intent efcd09c1 for only four owner-listed P4 handoff docs. A newer Dusky Lurking Shade consolidate-docs claim overlaps three of those files and says no git index. I sent Dusky a direct question and am paused before staging; no files are staged.
